notes: Pin x/y are percentages of the displayed car image (0.0..1.0). Curated for BMW E65 730li N52B30. Extend per car generation. Add/remove without code changes.

pins.name: MAF + IAT Sensor
pins.symptoms: Lean codes, rough idle, poor throttle response.

pins.name: Ignition Coils (cyl 1-6)
pins.function: Fire spark plugs. Replace as a set; common failure at 60-80k km.

pins.name: Intake Manifold + DISA
pins.function: DISA flap switches intake length for low/high rpm.
pins.symptoms: Loss of low-end torque, vacuum leak codes.

pins.name: Coolant Expansion Tank
pins.function: Coolant reservoir. Cracks at the seam are an E65 weak spot.
pins.symptoms: Coolant smell, low coolant warning, overheat.

pins.name: VANOS Solenoids (intake)
pins.function: Hydraulic cam phaser actuator. Sludge-sensitive — clean every oil change.
pins.symptoms: Cold-start rattle, P0011/P0014, loss of power.

pins.name: Cam Position Sensor
pins.function: Tells DME where the cam is. Pairs with crank sensor.

pins.name: Front Wheel Speed Sensor (LF)
pins.function: Reports wheel speed to DSC module — DSC then broadcasts vehicle speed to KOMBI cluster.
pins.symptoms: ABS/DSC light, speedometer dropouts, intermittent traction-control fault. DIRECTLY RELEVANT to your speedo issue.

pins.name: Rear Wheel Speed Sensor (RR)
pins.function: Same family — RR corner. Failures more common than LF on E65.
pins.symptoms: Intermittent speed drop, especially around bumps.

pins.name: OBD-II Port
pins.function: Driver footwell, behind kick panel. 16-pin DLC. This is where your vLinker BM+ plugs in.
pins.symptoms: App can't connect / no power on adapter LEDs.

pins.name: DME (engine ECU)
pins.function: Engine control unit. Lives near the engine bay firewall on E65.
pins.symptoms: P0601/P0606 = ECU failure. Battery disconnect resets adaptations.

pins.name: Engine (N52 inline-6)
pins.symptoms: See Engine Bay view for sensor detail.

pins.name: Cabin Air Filter
pins.function: Under windshield cowl. Service item — usually replaced annually.

pins.name: Battery + IBS (trunk)
pins.function: E65 battery lives in the trunk under the floor. IBS sensor monitors current draw.
pins.symptoms: Cold-start fail, voltage drop, BST/CBS code on cluster, battery needing registration after replacement.

pins.name: Fuel Tank + Sender
pins.function: Saddle tank with twin pumps on early E65.
pins.symptoms: Fuel gauge erratic, P0455 large EVAP leak.

pins.name: LF Headlight (FRM)
pins.function: Bi-xenon or halogen — controlled by FRM module.
pins.symptoms: Headlight dead but bulb good = FRM or bus issue.

pins.name: Radiator + Coolant Loop
pins.function: Front-mounted aluminum-plastic radiator. E65 end-tank cracks are common.
pins.symptoms: Visible drip, sweet smell, coolant low warning, overheat.
